com.mentor.chs.plugin.constraint

Interface IXPlacementConstraint

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXConstraint, IXPlugin

    public interface IXPlacementConstraint
extends IXConstraint
    Custom Constraint - used to control device placement in slots

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      boolean match(IXDevice device, IXSlot slot, IXDoDontResult result)
      Determine if constraint applies given these objects.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.IXPlugin

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

    • Method Detail

      • match

        boolean match(IXDevice device,
              IXSlot slot,
              IXDoDontResult result)
        Determine if constraint applies given these objects. If so, return a DO or DONT directive in the result to indicate the proper action.
        Parameters:
        device - - To be placed
        slot - - Being considered for placement
        result - - Return enumerated type for "DO PLACE" or for an explicit "DON'T PLACE". Set when returning "true" result.
        Returns:
        boolean - Does the constraint apply to this specific set of objects?
